customManagers.description: Track the sops binary version pinned as a shell var in config.env (standard managers don't parse it).
Track the age binary version pinned as a shell var in config.env.

packageRules.description: Major bumps never open a PR on their own — they wait for an explicit tick on the Dependency Dashboard. Enforces the pin-exact policy: a major (provider, ansible collection, base image, app image) is a deliberate act, reviewed for breaking changes, not a Monday-morning automerge.

sops/age each carry a paired *_SHA256 in config.env that Renovate cannot recompute. Gate their bumps behind dashboard approval so a version is never merged with a stale checksum — the operator refreshes the SHA256 in the same PR (the template build fails closed on a mismatch regardless).
